title: Are Cruise Lines Investable Yet?
text: Since the beginning of the pandemic, cruise companies have been virtually uninvestable. The stop-start nature of Covid restrictions around the world, coupled with self-imposed unwillingness to travel for many, have impacted the ability for these companies to grow and improve their financial situations after the abrupt halt to their income hit their already debt-ridden balance sheets hard.
